title: Device Home Screen - Unsupported device
scenario: Unsupported devices should not appear in the home screen device list after being paired and connected.
steps: Pair an unsupported device (e.g., BB Fit, Sync60) with the mobile app.
Open the home screen of the mobile app.
Check the device list displayed on the home screen.
expected: The unsupported device should not appear in the device list on the home screen.
